# Section Blueprints

| Section | Function | Key Claim | Evidence or Warrant Needed | Citation Support | Evidence Displays | Reference Principle Applied | Project Adaptation | Risk | Drafting Instruction |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Drafting Notes

- Each section serves the confirmed research spine and selected design family.
- Each target-derived move identifies the transferable principle and project-specific adaptation.
- Each finding, interpretation, or argument maps to evidence IDs.
- Each background or discussion claim maps to citation IDs.
- Each evidence display has an argument function and an allowed claim.
- Each limitation corresponds to a real design, source, positional, evidence, or inference boundary.
